questions: how to become a game designer
game design vs game development difference
game design er basics ki ki
answers: Game design is the process of creating the rules, mechanics, story, levels, and overall experience of a video game. It's about making games fun, engaging, and balanced.
Game design holo game er rules, mechanics, story, ar experience toiri kora. Ki fun hobe, challenge kemon hobe, player ki feel korbe — eishob game designer decide kore.

To become a game designer, study game mechanics, play lots of games critically, learn a game engine, create small games, and build a portfolio. A Game Design Document (GDD) outlines your game's vision, mechanics, and scope.
Game design focuses on what makes a game enjoyable — core loops, reward systems, difficulty curves, narrative, and player psychology. Good game design keeps players in a state of flow.
